utilityLinks.title: Career Services
utilityLinks.subtitle: Handshake · Jobs · Internships
utilityLinks.description: Search internships, co-ops, and full-time positions. Schedule mock interviews and career coaching through NC A&T Career Services on Handshake.

utilityLinks.title: Professional Development
utilityLinks.subtitle: Resume · Headshots · Attire
utilityLinks.description: Access professional attire through The Aggie Rack, schedule headshots, and get resume reviews through Career Services.

utilityLinks.title: Leadership & Civic Engagement
utilityLinks.subtitle: Student Development · SGA · Greek Life
utilityLinks.description: Explore leadership tracks, student government, Greek letter organizations, and civic engagement programs.

utilityLinks.title: Student Organizations
utilityLinks.subtitle: Clubs · Societies · Honor Orgs
utilityLinks.description: Discover and join 200+ campus organizations. Build your experiential portfolio through cross-disciplinary engagement.

utilityLinks.title: International Programs
utilityLinks.subtitle: Study Abroad · Global Exchange
utilityLinks.description: Explore semester-long and short-term study abroad opportunities through the Office of International Affairs.

utilityLinks.title: Undergraduate Research
utilityLinks.subtitle: CUGR · Faculty Mentorship · Labs
utilityLinks.description: Find research opportunities, apply for undergraduate research assistantships, and connect with faculty mentors through the Center for Undergraduate Research.

utilityLinks.title: Alumni Network
utilityLinks.subtitle: Mentorship · Networking · Legacy
utilityLinks.description: Connect with NC A&T alumni for mentorship, industry insights, and professional networking through the Alumni Association.

utilityLinks.title: Aggie Access
utilityLinks.subtitle: Banner · DegreeWorks · Registration
utilityLinks.description: Access your student portal for registration, degree audits, financial aid, and academic records via Aggie Access (Banner).
